name: @field-ui/field-ui
description: Alias for @field-ui/kit — one install for the whole field-ui suite. Prefer @field-ui/kit, or install the individual @field-ui/* packages directly. (The engine itself is @field-ui/core.)
author: Zach Shallbetter <hi@zachshallbetter.com> (https://zachshallbetter.com)
